svg.title: Wellora Diet Chatbot Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture showing user input flowing through profile manager, intent classifier, and knowledge retrieval to personalized diet responses

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should the user onboarding profile work for the Wellora diet chatbot?')
sendPrompt('What intents should the diet chatbot classify?')
sendPrompt('How should meal recommendation work in the diet chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How should food lookup and calorie logging work?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of diet Q&A should the chatbot handle?')
sendPrompt('How should BMI and progress tracking work in the chatbot?')
sendPrompt('What should the nutrition database contain for the diet chatbot?')
sendPrompt('How should meal plan templates be structured in the dataset?')
sendPrompt('How should user profiles be stored for the chatbot?')
sendPrompt('What disease-specific diet data should be included?')
sendPrompt('How should Claude API be used as the AI engine for the diet chatbot?')
sendPrompt('What should a personalized diet chatbot response look like?')
g.text: Meal plan · food info · advice · nudges

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should the feedback loop and personalization improve over time?')
